message:
feat(fp-frame): add replace_map, apply_fn_na, resample agg multi

- Series::replace_map: HashMap-based value replacement
- Series::apply_fn_na: apply function while preserving NaN values
- DataFrameResample::agg: multi-function resample aggregation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
